subject: [RFC PATCH v2 3/9] mm: percpu: fix obj_exts metadata charge size

2026-06-26.patch_summary: This patch fixes a metadata charge size calculation error in the Linux kernel's percpu code. The function pcpu_obj_full_size was using the wrong size for the obj_exts metadata, which is actually an array of struct pcpuobj_ext rather than a single struct obj_cgroup pointer. The fix involves changing the size calculation to use sizeof(struct pcpuobj_ext) instead of sizeof(struct obj_cgroup *). This patch addresses a problem introduced by a previous commit that added support for profiling memory allocations.
